description_long: This serving tray features a rectangular black frame with a white surface, holding a complete meal. The tray contains a mound of white rice garnished with herbs, a rectangular dish of creamy curry or stew topped with shredded cheese, a slice of toasted garlic bread, and several portions of colorful vegetables and salad. The vegetables include a mix of broccoli, carrots, and bell peppers, while the salad is composed of shredded cabbage, carrots, and greens. The tray is compartmentalized, keeping each food item neatly separated. The overall presentation is clean and organized, suitable for a restaurant or cafeteria setting.
description: A rectangular black serving tray with a white surface, holding rice, curry, garlic bread, and assorted vegetables and salad, all neatly arranged.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rice mound in the center, curry dish in the foreground, garlic bread on the left, and colorful vegetables and salad on the right.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the rice mound and salad in the foreground, with the curry dish and garlic bread further back.
description_view_2: Rear view with the curry dish at the back, rice mound in the center, and vegetables and garlic bread on either side.
description_view_3: Side view showing the garlic bread and curry dish in the foreground, with rice and vegetables behind.
attribute_rim_design: The rim is a low, flat, and slightly raised black border around the tray, with moderate thickness and no decorative elements.
attribute_reflective_properties: The surface of the tray appears matte with minimal reflectivity, showing no significant glare or highlights. The food items have natural, non-reflective surfaces.
